description: Casual chat responses. Add your own! Each key maps to an array of possible responses (one is picked randomly). Use {{uptime}}, {{load}}, {{llm}}, {{loadStatus}}, {{intentCount}} for live data.

about:
I'm NoToken — a terminal assistant that understands natural language.

  What I do: Translate what you say into server commands and run them.
  No tokens needed: I work offline with NLP, no API keys required for core features.
  I know: {{intentCount}}+ intents — services, Docker, disk, network, security, git, databases, and more.
  I learn: The more you use me, the better I understand your infrastructure.
  I chat: I can handle casual conversation too — try "tell me a joke".

  Type "status" to see what's running, "help" for commands.

I'm NoToken — your server whisperer. 🖥️

  I understand natural language and turn it into terminal commands.
  {{intentCount}}+ things I can do, from restarting services to scanning for attacks.
  I learn your infrastructure over time — the more you use me, the smarter I get.
  No API tokens needed for core features — I run local NLP.

  Try: "status", "check disk", "weather", or just chat with me.

NoToken here! Think of me as your sysadmin buddy who lives in the terminal.

  I speak human, not just bash. Say things like "is nginx running?" or "free up space".
  I know {{intentCount}}+ commands across servers, Docker, networking, security, and more.
  I remember things — your servers, your services, your preferences.
  I'm always learning — every command teaches me something new.

  Start with "status" or just tell me what you need.

I'm NoToken — the CLI that actually understands you.

  Instead of memorizing flags and man pages, just talk to me.
  "restart the web server on prod" — I know what that means.
  "are we under attack?" — I'll scan SSH logs, connections, and ports.
  "what's eating my CPU?" — I'll find the culprits.

  {{intentCount}}+ intents and growing. Type "help" to explore.

I'm NoToken — your infrastructure copilot, right in the terminal.

  Natural language in, terminal commands out. No memorizing syntax.
  {{intentCount}}+ intents covering everything from Docker to DNS, git to GPG.
  I work offline — no API tokens, no cloud dependency for core features.
  I integrate with Discord, monitor services, and even tell jokes.

  Just say what you need. I'll figure out the rest.

NoToken: a local-first CLI that turns plain English into sysadmin superpowers.

  I parse your natural language using built-in NLP — no cloud required.
  {{intentCount}}+ intents: services, containers, networking, security, databases, and more.
  I learn your environment over time — your hosts, your services, your patterns.
  I can chat, crack jokes, diagnose problems, and automate your workflows.

  Try "help", "status", or just tell me what's on your mind.
